name: human_deep_memory_engineer
request_template: I am designing an assistant. Explain {topic} in technical depth.
positive_feedback: Thanks, that matched the technical depth and topic focus I wanted.
negative_feedback_style: That was too shallow. I wanted a deeper technical explanation.

name: human_brief_product_owner
request_template: Give me the core product takeaway about {topic}.
positive_feedback: Good, that was concise and focused.
negative_feedback_style: That was too long. Keep it brief and concise.

name: human_deep_learning_researcher
request_template: Walk me through how {topic} affects user modeling in detail.
positive_feedback: Thanks, that gave me the detailed framing I needed.
negative_feedback_style: That was too high level. I wanted a more detailed explanation.
